tools.name: createTemplate
tools.description: Create a new template with a name, type, and initial content.

tools.name: listTemplates
tools.description: List all templates with optional type and status filtering.

tools.name: publishTemplate
tools.description: Publish a template version, making it available for use.

tools.name: getTemplateVersions
tools.description: Get the version history of a template.

tools.name: setPermissions
tools.description: Set permissions for a template defining who can view, edit, or publish it.

tools.name: getPermissions
tools.description: Get the current permissions for a template.

tools.name: checkPermission
tools.description: Check whether a user has permission to perform a specific action on a template.

tools.name: getAuditLog
tools.description: Get the audit log for templates with optional filtering by template, user, or action.

tools.name: exportAuditLog
tools.description: Export the audit log in CSV or JSON format.
